title: Henbrandt Pack of 12 Tall Gold Party Candles with 12 Candle Holders, 12.5cm Metallic Tall and Thin Celebration Candles for Birthday Cakes Wedding Parties Baby Shower and Anniversary Decorations
features: Pack of 12 Tall Gold Party Candles and 12 candle holders in matching gold.
These tall and dainty candles are ideal for birthday cakes, baby showers and anniversary celebrations.
One box contains 12 tall pastel candles and 12 candle holders, for use 2-3 times.
Size: These candles measure approx. 12.5cm in height.
Recommended for ages 14+. These cake candles should be used under adult supervision and children should not be left alone with lit flames.
description: Product description These stunning gold party candles are tall and thin and perfect for illuminating cakes and cupcakes for all ages and celebrations. Whether you are marking a special birthday party, baby shower, or hen party, the tall and thin shining gold party candles add elegance to any spread of confectionary and baked goods. Each pack of golden party candles includes 12 tall candles and 12 candle holders in matching gold. Simply attach the holder to the candle, place on a cake, and light for a truly beautiful display. Each birthday candle can be used between 2 and 3 times, and they are made from safe and non-toxic wax. Use these gold coloured party candles responsibly. These cake candles are recommended for ages 14 and above and are not to be used without adult supervision. Single pack of 12 shining gold party candles and 12 candle holders per order. Candles are packed in blister packs. The party candles are non-toxic, and are compliant with all applicable UK and EU candle safety requirements. Safety Warning Use these gold coloured party candles responsibly. These cake candles are recommended for ages 14 and above and are not to be used without adult supervision. Keep away from flammable materials and never leave a burning candle unattended. Extinguish candles when they get too close to the holder or container. Always use a candle holder designed for candle size. Dispose of candle remnants and containers properly.
